options.name: null-input
options.description: use `null` as the single input value

options.name: raw-input
options.description: read each line as string instead of JSON

options.name: slurp
options.description: read all inputs into an array and use it as the single input value

options.name: compact-output
options.description: compact instead of pretty-printed output

options.name: raw-output
options.description: output strings without escapes and quotes

options.name: raw-output0
options.description: implies -r and output NUL after each output

options.name: join-output
options.description: implies -r and output without newline after each output

options.name: ascii-output
options.description: output strings by only ASCII characters using escape sequences

options.name: sort-keys
options.description: sort keys of each object on output

options.name: color-output
options.description: colorize JSON output

options.name: monochrome-output
options.description: disable colored output

options.name: tab
options.description: use tabs for indentation

options.name: indent
options.description: use n spaces for indentation (max 7 spaces)

options.name: unbuffered
options.description: flush output stream after each output

options.name: stream
options.description: parse the input value in streaming fashion

options.name: stream-errors
options.description: implies --stream and report parse error as an array

options.name: seq
options.description: parse input/output as application/json-seq

options.name: from-file
options.description: load the filter from a file

options.name: library-path
options.description: search modules from the directory

options.name: arg
options.description: set $name to the string value

options.name: argjson
options.description: set $name to the JSON value

options.name: slurpfile
options.description: set $name to an array of JSON values read from the file

options.name: rawfile
options.description: set $name to string contents of file

options.name: args
options.description: consume remaining arguments as positional string values

options.name: jsonargs
options.description: consume remaining arguments as positional JSON values

options.name: exit-status
options.description: set exit status code based on the output

options.name: binary
options.description: open input/output streams in binary mode

options.name: version
options.description: show the version

options.name: build-configuration
options.description: show jq's build configuration

options.name: help
options.description: show the help

positionals.name: jq filter
positionals.description: jq filter expression to apply to JSON input
